description: Upgrade Claude model from claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022 to claude-sonnet-4-6 for better SQL accuracy and reasoning (Issue #20)

userStories.title: Update model config to claude-sonnet-4-6
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the backend to use the latest Claude model so investors get higher-quality AI answers.
acceptanceCriteria: MODEL_CONFIG.model in backend/src/config/claude.js is set to 'claude-sonnet-4-6'
CONFIDENCE_MODEL_CONFIG.model in backend/src/config/claude.js is set to 'claude-sonnet-4-6'
npm test passes in the backend
Frontend build passes (npm run build in frontend/)
